title: CreditEvent
description: One row per credit lifecycle event. Logged to the credit_ledger table on every reserve, charge, refund, or add.

event_id.description: Globally unique id (UUID) for the ledger entry.

amount.description: Credit amount involved in this event.

balance_after.description: Account balance after this event was applied.

generation_id.description: Links reserve/charge/refund to a specific generation. Required for charge and refund, optional for reserve.

description.description: Human-readable note. For 'add' events, this is the idempotency key (e.g. 'invoice:inv_xxx').

occurred_at.description: RFC 3339 timestamp of when the event occurred.
